disclaimer: 25 real, branch-isolated peripheral mutation generations. Each generation performs exactly one real deterministic mutation (a memoized recompute reduction) whose output is byte-identical, while the protected core stays byte-invariant and governance plus human approval are preserved. The recompute reduction is measured, not projected. No core module is touched, nothing is merged, and per-generation regression survival is confirmed by the mandatory v1-v31 full regression. Replay-stable; human approval mandatory.
